199 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **82 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 19 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$50,136 in payments going out this week** across 34 tasks — make sure funds are available. $39,388 expected in from 4 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Stephanie and Marc Felton and Clifford Clack — Gym Addition — make sure resources are lined up.
